---
name: "🐞 Bug Report"
about: Report a glitch so I can squash it and keep the chaos productive.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: ["Shannon-Goddard"]
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is and why it's a problem.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear description of what you expected to happen.

**Environment Info**
- Device/OS: [e.g. iPhone 15, iOS 18.2]
- App Version: [Check Settings → About in the app]
- Environment: [Web / Mobile / CI-Strains Ledger]
- Browser (if web): [e.g. Chrome, Safari]

**Screenshots / Videos**
If applicable, add screenshots or a short screen recording. They help a ton!

**Additional context**
Add any other details that might help (logs, strain name, nutrient schedule, etc.).

---

**"We Pass Them Left, Then Watch the Industry Blink."**  

Thanks for helping make GrowApp (and the rest of the chaos) better! 🌿
